title: great value mod
description: A mod that adds the great value logo into the game.
body:
Do you want blocks that only has the great value logo on it? Or a recipe for the debug stick? Or a dimention that only has the great value logo? If so then this is for you.
 
 # Features (get ready for a lot of great value)
### Blocks
- Great value grass
- Great value wood
- Great value leafs
- Great value block
- Great value stone
- Great value food
### Misc
- Great value painting
- Great value water
- Great value dimention paired with its own portal ignighter
- A music disc for the song "Eek!" by Surasshu 
### Recipes
- A recipe for the debug stick
- A recipe for converting the Great value stone into stone
And more!!!!!

#  
This mod is intended for singleplayer only. If you want to show a friend the mod, just send them the mod and a tutorial on how to get mods in minecraft if they dont know already.
#  
(All credits goes to Surasshu, Walmart, and the people at Mcreator for various assets and the mod maker that i used)
